steps.title: Separate recognition from identity
steps.content: The opening phrase gives the year the area was recognized, but the main clause defines what the Wheeling National Heritage Area is. A defining identity should be expressed as an ongoing present fact.

steps.title: Reject unsupported time shifts
steps.content: A implies the state had already ended before another past event. B treats the identity as only past, and D needs a future reference the sentence does not provide. The answer is C.
